title: How A Beauty Company Built An AI Agent — With Rachel Williamson and Josh Siebert
summary: Ulta Beauty deployed ServiceNow's AI-powered HR automation platform across its 65,000-person workforce for employee onboarding, lifecycle management, and HR automation. The deployment involved decisions about process automation versus human-in-the-loop interactions and influenced hiring and operational planning.
